titleStmt.title: Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 11

div.p: Robert, by the grace of God bishop of St Andrews, to all sons of holy mother Church, Greeting: Let all people know, future as well as present, that we have granted and by episcopal authority made firm to the prior St Andrews, and to the brethren serving God there, all parts of the offerings of the altar, except the seventh, which by right belongs to the bishop, free and quit, and exempt from every exaction. With these witnesses: William the bishop of Moray, Osbert the abbot of Jedburgh, Aiulf the dean, Master Andrew, Master Herbert, John the bishop's nephew, Mater Thomas, Adam the chaplain.
